_comment: Neutral-atom zoned architecture for the distance-3 two-patch surface-code XX-merge, made CONSISTENT with FormalRV's system-spec zones (Adder2EndToEnd.lean myArch): the single storage SLM is partitioned into the SAME four zones as FormalRV by row band -- Data (rows 0-2), Ancilla (rows 3-5), Factory (rows 6-8, magic |CCZ>, reserved/empty since the XX-merge is Clifford), Routing (rows 9-11). The ENTANGLEMENT zone is the neutral-atom-specific addition: the Rydberg region where the merge's CZ physically happens (the FormalRV logical Gate2q is realized by moving atoms here). 53 atoms = 26 data + 1 surgery ancilla (Data zone) + 26 syndrome ancillas (Ancilla zone). Distances um, durations us.
name: surface3_d3_surgery_arch
